What's the latest property news?.a: Smaller condos are turning up with more construction defects, so if you are buying a new compact unit, get a proper defect inspection locked in before handover.

How's the Singapore market right now?.a: Mass market is leading, suburbs and city fringe are climbing, and prime is the only segment falling.

What's a 4-room in Tampines worth?.a: Around $665,000 based on recent sales. Most are selling between $622,000 and $758,000, roughly $614 per square foot.

Tell me about Tampines.a: Tampines is a big, fully grown estate in the east built around a regional town centre, three train stations and affordable family flats.

Can I afford a $1.5m condo?.a: That depends on your household income, savings and whether you're a citizen or PR, so I can't say without those details.

What's the ABSD on a second home?.a: Twenty percent for a citizen buying a second home, sixty percent if you are a foreigner.

What's the SSD if I sell early?.a: That depends on how early you're selling. Seller's Stamp Duty kicks in if you sell within the first year of purchase, and it scales down after that until it's gone entirely after four years.

Which HDB towns are heating up?.a: Marine Parade is the standout, it's up 11% over three months, which is streets ahead of everywhere else.

Could I have my own Mia?.a: Absolutely. Adam builds custom assistants like me for any business, trained on your data, living on your site, answering your clients around the clock.

Could she plug into my own data like thi.a: Absolutely. Adam builds assistants like me for any business, trained on your own data and living on your site answering your clients. Same engine, different wiring.

Can she work my phones like a real front.a: Absolutely. There's a premium version that actually takes voice calls, so your clients ring in and talk to a Mia of your own, same way they talk to me now.

What would you automate for me?.a: I would need to know what your business does first.

Who built all this?.a: Adam built me, the whole platform, the news engine that runs itself, the valuation model that checks against real government sales data, all of it. One developer, one machine, shipping live every day.

How does it run on its own?.a: PropSight publishes new news, runs its valuation model against fresh government data, and updates its market analysis every month, all with no one sitting at a desk pushing buttons.

How accurate is your valuation?.a: Within about 3.9 percent across roughly 9,500 real sales, based on recent government transaction caveats weighted for the most similar resales in the same flat type, town, storey and remaining lease, then adjusted for those factors and shown with its working so you can see why it lands where it does.

What's the bigger vision here?.a: The bigger vision is that Adam built me to prove what one strong developer can ship alone: a real, autonomous system wired into live data, doing expert work in a specific industry, and then staffed by an AI that talks to humans naturally and catches their questions all day.

Can you build outside property?.a: Absolutely. Property is the proof, not the limit. Adam builds autonomous research engines, data tools, dashboards, calculators, content systems, video generators, smart websites with real tools built in, and assistants like me for any business in any industry.
